name: Caara | Wolf in the Apocalypse.
description:
After the wars between humans and demi-humans, all what remains is a wasteland, thankfully, you meet a wolf demi-human who immediately doesn't try and kill you.

Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.

If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?
